message:
Command `MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
WRAPPER_RUN="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Verify state_out.json exists in step 23 (applydeftemplate) ==="
# Check what state files exist for restart
ls -la "$WRAPPER_RUN/23-odb-applydeftemplate/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "EXISTS" || echo "MISSING"
ls -la "$WRAPPER_RUN/22-odb-customioplacement/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "EXISTS" || echo "MISSING"

echo ""
echo "=== Check if we can restart --from GlobalPlacement ==="
cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/23-odb-applydeftemplate/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== Restart from GlobalPlacement (skip synthesis, use existing results) ==="
echo "Start: $(date)"

cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \
  --run-tag wrapper_run \
  --design-dir . \
  --from OpenROAD.GlobalPlacement \
  config.json \
  >> /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log 2>&1 &

NEW_PID=$!
echo "New LibreLane PID: $NEW_PID"
sleep 5
ps -p $NEW_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "Running" || echo "Failed to start"
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log` executed with exit code 0.

echo ""
echo "=== Check if we can restart --from GlobalPlacement ==="
cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/23-odb-applydeftemplate/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null | head -10

extras.command:
MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
WRAPPER_RUN="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

echo "=== Verify state_out.json exists in step 23 (applydeftemplate) ==="
# Check what state files exist for restart
ls -la "$WRAPPER_RUN/23-odb-applydeftemplate/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "EXISTS" || echo "MISSING"
ls -la "$WRAPPER_RUN/22-odb-customioplacement/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null && echo "EXISTS" || echo "MISSING"

echo ""
echo "=== Check if we can restart --from GlobalPlacement ==="
cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/23-odb-applydeftemplate/state_out.json" 2>/dev/null | head -10

echo ""
echo "=== Restart from GlobalPlacement (skip synthesis, use existing results) ==="
echo "Start: $(date)"

cd "$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

nohup librelane \
  --pdk-root /nc/pdk \
  --pdk sky130A \

ps -p $NEW_PID -o pid,stat,pcpu,pmem,etime 2>/dev/null && echo "Running" || echo "Failed to start"
tail -5 /tmp/librelane_wrapper.log
